pages.text: $(italic)Create: Copycats+$() gives you $(bold)copycat blocks$() — blocks that borrow the $(italic)texture$() of any other block while keeping a chosen shape: panels, slabs, steps, beams, fences, and more.$(br2)They're a builder's dream for camouflage and for matching Create's industrial look to any palette in the pack. Apply a block with the material in hand; change it any time.
pages.title: Copycats+
